raw_consumer_statement: Citibank denied my fraud claim multiple times for an unauthorized transaction despite clear evidence that the charge was not made by me. A fraudulent charge was made using my cards EMV chip and Citibank denied the claim solely because they say the physical chip was present. However, I did not make this purchase, and my daughter who theyre saying was present with the chip was at work in XXXX XXXX , at the time of the transaction that happened in XXXX XXXX XXXX Before this happened, Citibank had mailed me a replacement card because my original card was expiring, but the replacement card under my daughters name never arrived, suggesting it may have been intercepted or stolen, I tried to call them and they told me not to worry my daughters card who is an authorized user is on its way and shipped out separately and that its on the way, we got a fraudulent charge XXXX $ from a Diner in XXXX XXXX and {$300.00} from a flower shop, and I called again to cancel the whole card and get new numbers. Citibank failed to properly investigate this fraud, ignored the fact that I nor my authorized users were not physically present where the transaction occurred, and is now unfairly holding me responsible for a charge of {$410.00} I did not authorize. I tried requesting a full reinvestigation, reversal of the charge, and accountability for their inadequate fraud handling. I am not someone who files disputes, it has been years. Their customer service treats such loyal customers terribly, they dont understand the situation at all they are lost. After this I am considering completing withdrawing any further business with them, they are unreasonably unprofessional.
